configurations.name: dashboard
configurations._note: Bubbletea TUI — terminal app, no HTTP port. Run in a terminal session.

configurations.name: scan
configurations._note: CLI tool — scans Greenhouse/Ashby/Lever APIs for new job postings.

configurations.name: ingest
configurations._note: CLI tool — processes ingest specs from data/ingest/ to generate resumes.

configurations.name: pdf
configurations._note: CLI tool — renders HTML CV template to PDF via Playwright.

configurations.name: doctor
configurations._note: CLI tool — pipeline health check (dependencies, config, file integrity).
